'''Hilissa''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Essowyn]], the [[Saurton]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. It was located in the north-western hemisphere, on the continent of [[Sorontill]]. It contained the planet's main [[Hilissa Spaceport|spaceport]].

{{Loc-stub}}
